title: Camera Overhaul Reforged
description: Makes gameplay more satisfying through the use of various camera tilting. Configurable.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/raK3nrCNiC8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Project Archived
This mod was a continuation of CorgiTaco's commissioned Forge port of Camera Overhaul by Mirsario. Mirsario is planning support for Forge/NeoForge, which means I will be discontinuing this project, and be contributing to the official project where I can.

## Version Support?
The offical Camera Overhaul by Mirsario is a Fabric mod, that currently supports 1.14.4+ in one binary. Forge/NeoForge version will support the same version range as the fabric version and possibly even earlier versions of Minecraft Forge will be supported in the future.

## When?
That's not for me to say. Keep a weather eye on Mirsario's project linked below. Until then, feel free to use this project to download the mod and play with it to your heart's content, just know that it will no longer be recieving updates.

## Credit

[CameraOverhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/cameraoverhaul/) [FABRIC/QUILT]

[CameraOverhaul (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/camera-overhaul-forge) [FORGE <=1.19.2]


## License Discrepancy
The metadata in my mod will tell you the license for this project is MIT, however, as of December 21, 2024, the official mod's license was changed to GNU/GPL3.0, so there will be a discrepancy between the mod's metadata, and this project page on Modrinth.

# Camera Overhaul Reforged

_"CameraOverhaul a clientside Minecraft mod that attempts to improve overall satisfaction of the game through the introduction of various camera rotations, to emphasize on the player's movement and improve visual feedback. Strafing and turning around will tilt the camera sideways. Jumping, falling, and moving forward/backwards will affect the camera's pitch."_

## Config

You can also manually find the configuration file with intensity scaling for all features at 
**/config/cameraoverhaul.toml**
